timing_note: The pinned dataset commit predates arXiv v2 (2026-01-07) and is the official Hugging Face dataset HEAD observed at acquisition. The paper identifies this dataset URL; this does not prove that every v2 analysis used an identical unpublished snapshot.
archive_method: git archive --format=zip at the pinned official commit with Git LFS smudging disabled; the archive therefore preserves LFS pointer files rather than duplicating large objects

inspection.scope_note: The complete 403-row JSONL, including embedded paper_content, was acquired and validated. The separate 380 MB papers.zip was not duplicated locally; its immutable LFS object identifier and declared size are preserved.
